title: Sprint-M P1: Implement Taskboard v2 Mobile-First from Claude Design Handoff
description:
Agent-Role-Declaration: Operator (pieter_pan) -> Pixel (frontend-guru)

Handoff: Claude Design V2.4 Prototype -> Next.js Implementation
Scope: Port Claude Design Taskboard v2 prototype (iPhone 14 + Tablet + Desktop 1440 + 5 Interaction-States) to live Mission Control. Handoff bundle vollstaendig verified (10 files, 212KB). Alle 5 Modal-States strukturell vorhanden, nicht inferenz-pflichtig.

Done: Sprint-K 12/14 done (H1-H8 + H10-H13). Sprint-L L1 MVP+Deep. Sprint-I Mobile-Polish v2 done.
Open: Desktop + Mobile responsive implementation gem. Claude Design Handoff.
State-Snapshot: Handoff-Bundle importiert 2026-04-20 09:03 UTC nach vault/03-Agents/claude-design-handoffs/2026-04-20-taskboard/. 10 files: design-canvas.jsx, mc-mobile-shared.jsx, mc-tokens.css, mc-v1.jsx, mc-v2.jsx, mc-v2-responsive.jsx, mc-v2-states-canvas.jsx, mc-v2-states.jsx, Taskboard v2 - Mobile Redesign.html, tokens.js. Existing MC components sind ready: task-card.tsx (mit useSwipe), task-detail-modal.tsx, command-palette.tsx, agent-load-panel.tsx, activity-feed.tsx, system-pulse.tsx. Zu erstellen: MorningStatusHero.tsx (neu).

Entschieden: Violet #7c3aed brand + zinc gradient + amber-only-for-stalled. Mobile-first primary, Tablet + Desktop graceful scale-up. Preserve real codebase copy. shadcn/ui + Radix only.

Offen-Entschieden: Bridge-strategie zwischen neuem MorningStatusHero und bestehendem taskboard-client.tsx (57KB). Empfehlung: neues Hero als zusatz-component oben in taskboard-client render, kein refactor des existing client. Bei mobile: MorningStatusHero shows, existing 5-lane-grid verschwindet zugunsten Single-Lane-Focus; Desktop >=1024px: MorningStatusHero komprimiert horizontal, 5-lane-grid bleibt.

Anti-Scope: Keine Refactor existing task-card.tsx oder task-detail-modal.tsx. Keine light-theme-Einfuehrung. Keine neuen top-level routes. Keine non-shadcn Components. Keine Changes an taskboard-client state-management (nur UI-layer).

Task ID: SPRINT-M-P1-TASKBOARD-V2-IMPLEMENTATION

Objective: Port Claude Design V2.4 Taskboard-Prototype als funktionale Next.js Implementierung. Mobile hero-state + Desktop horizontal-strip + 5 Modal-interaction-states live auf /taskboard.

Implementation-Steps:

1. Pre-Flight Audit (~20 min):
   - Handoff-Bundle: alle 10 files lesen, Rendering-Vorschau via HTML-Datei
   - Compare mc-tokens.css gegen existing src/app/globals.css (token-deltas)
   - Compare tokens.js gegen tailwind.config.ts (theme-extend-deltas)
   - Identify welche bestehenden Components reused + welche erweitert

2. Design-System Token-Merge (~30 min):
   File: src/app/globals.css
   - Merge mc-tokens.css deltas (nur neue CSS-vars adden, keine ueberschreibungen)
   - Violet-brand tokens (--primary #7c3aed, --accent #7c3aed, --ring) sind schon da
   - Neue Tokens moeglicherweise: --panel-active, --border-strong, --safe-top/bottom
   - commit 1: chore(sprint-m): merge claude-design tokens to globals.css

3. MorningStatusHero Component (~1h):
   File: src/components/taskboard/MorningStatusHero.tsx (NEU)
   Source: mc-v2.jsx lines fuer Hero-Section + mc-v2-responsive.jsx fuer Desktop-Variant
   - Responsive: mobile full-width, desktop compressed horizontal strip
   - Big stalled-count number (clamp 56-88px as refined in V2.2)
   - Heartbeat-Strip (sparkline 48 buckets, procedural amplitude)
   - MOST URGENT card mit left-border + pulse-dot
   - LANES Chip-Row mit status-dots (rose-500 / cyan / sky / amber / emerald)
   - commit 2: feat(taskboard): MorningStatusHero with responsive breakpoints

4. Single-Lane-Focus Mobile Pattern (~1h):
   File: src/components/taskboard/taskboard-client.tsx (UI-layer only)
   - Below lg breakpoint: lanes collapse to chip-row selector + single-lane view
   - Chip-tap switches focused lane
   - 52px swipe-chips as spec
   - Existing 5-lane grid remains on >=lg desktop
   - commit 3: feat(taskboard): mobile single-lane-focus with chip selector

5. Swipe-Actions Wiring (~45 min):
   File: src/components/taskboard/task-card.tsx (minor enhancements)
   - Existing useSwipe is already wired, just ensure gestures match Claude Design:
     - swipe-right (>80px) = Dispatch/Retry
     - swipe-left (>80px) = Admin cleanup
     - long-press (>500ms) = Details/Retry/Cancel sheet
   - Ghost-chevron-indicators auf first-view (opacity 0.3 -> 0.6 breathing 3s), fade-out nach first swipe
   - commit 4: feat(taskboard): swipe-action affordance + long-press menu

6. 5 Modal-States (~2h):
   Sources: mc-v2-states.jsx functions (all 5 present, not inference-required)
   - DetailsSheetMobile + DetailsModalDesktop: erweitern existing task-detail-modal.tsx
     (preserve existing logic, add mobile-sheet vs desktop-dialog variant)
   - AdminConfirmDialog (width 440, rose-tinted destructive): new confirmation component
   - RetryConfirmDialog (width 440, violet, used/cap display): new confirmation component
   - CommandPalette: existing command-palette.tsx erweitern fuer CMD_ITEMS list rendering gem. Spec
   - AllClearHero + QuietEmptyLane: in empty-states rendering taskboard-client integrieren
   - commit 5: feat(taskboard): 5 interaction-state modals from handoff

7. Build + Verify (~30 min):
   - npm run build (success check)
   - mc-restart-safe 120 "pixel-sprint-m-p1-deploy"
   - Verify http://localhost:3000/taskboard auf 3 viewports:
     - Chrome DevTools Mobile 390x844 -> V2 hero + chip-swap + single-lane
     - Tablet 768x1024 -> 2-col grid + hero full-width
     - Desktop 1440x900 -> 5-lane + horizontal strip + right-rail
   - Playwright Screenshots erstellen fuer comparison vs Claude Design prototype
   - commit 6: chore(sprint-m): taskboard v2 live

8. Delta-Report + Hand-Off (~20 min):
   File: /home/piet/vault/03-Agents/sprint-m-p1-pixel-delta-report-2026-04-20.md
   - Screenshots vor/nach
   - Any visual-deltas gegen prototype
   - Tokens-mapping-table
   - Component-modification-summary

Definition of Done:

- src/components/taskboard/MorningStatusHero.tsx neu erstellt, responsive
- taskboard-client.tsx modified mit mobile single-lane-focus logic (lesend, no state-management break)
- task-card.tsx swipe-affordance enhanced (existing useSwipe reused)
- task-detail-modal.tsx responsive sheet/dialog variants
- 2 new modals: AdminConfirmDialog, RetryConfirmDialog
- command-palette.tsx erweitert mit CMD_ITEMS-Pattern
- AllClearHero, QuietEmptyLane empty-states integriert
- npm run build gruen, npm test gruen (existing tests + any added)
- mc-restart-safe success, /api/health 200
- /taskboard live auf 3 viewports visuell verified gegen Claude Design prototype
- Delta-Report in vault/03-Agents/
- Commits: 5-6 atomic commits mit klaren messages
- R35 done nur nach ls-verify der files + git log
- R45 receipt=accepted within 60s, progress pro Commit, result final
- R49 alle claims inline-verified (build-output, screenshots, file-paths)
- R42/R46 mc-restart-safe genutzt (nicht direkt systemctl)

  - Build-status + mc-restart-safe verification
  - Live /taskboard status on 3 viewports
  - Delta-Report-path
  - Any inference-where-handoff-was-ambiguous (mit file-ref)

VERIFICATION: actual terminal-outputs + screenshots (not claimed)

Zeit-Budget: 4-6h (inkl. 1h buffer fuer unforeseen).
